title: 2023 Singapore reported median total compensation by work arrangement
summary: Aggregate results from Design Pay Asia 2022-23 survey data, filtered exactly to Country = Singapore and Currency you draw your salary in = SGD (n=223). Work-arrangement medians are Hybrid n=179 at S$81,900; In-office n=21 at S$52,000; and Remote n=23 at S$143,336. These are respondent medians, not population estimates.
methodology: The authoritative worksheet was filtered using exact matches Country = Singapore and Currency you draw your salary in = SGD, leaving n=223. One Singapore response reported in USD was excluded and no currency conversion was applied. Values are self-reported total compensation medians. All published work-arrangement cohorts meet the minimum n=10 threshold, and no respondent-level data is exposed.
